title: 黛纳
content_json: [{"key":"0.61276041660352516","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1131/h_580/50364/103682/2024/9/25/392856.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_973/h_744/50364/103682/2024/9/25/169278.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.2901012303f4a","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黛纳"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者黛纳，身份编码E01-050959，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海德拉银行的高级经理，效命于十大经理人之一「宁芙涅」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为人赤忱忠诚，极具责任心，做事干练利落，雷厉风行，再棘手的难题都能迎刃而解。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"严于律己甚过严以待人，与同为经理人的克拉肯形成了鲜明对比。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"平日里几乎不会参与任何交际活动，也拒绝一切与任务和命令无关的邀约，对宁芙涅有着不可动摇的忠诚，会坚决执行她下达的一切命令。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"过于严肃的外表和一本正经的态度总会让旁人认为她是一位不解风情的冷面美人，克拉肯对此作出的评价更是毒辣，认定其「注定会孤独终身」。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"p paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【雷厉风行的高级经理人。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「克拉肯先生，黛纳小姐一直都是这样的吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你指的是哪方面？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今日难得在海德拉银行的工区看见正襟危坐的克拉肯，新来的人事职员立刻便凑上前来打听消息—一她听说克拉肯不仅人脉广泛，还深受宁芙涅的信任，若是能够了解到更详细的「内幕八卦」，或许能让她之后与黛纳小姐的相处变得容易许多。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「当然是对待工作的热情！要知道，我上周只是去提醒她尽快使用本年度的假期，做好假期安排，话还没说完就被她利落地打断然后拒绝了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「啊对，我之前也被这样对待呢……感觉黛纳小姐似乎不知道假期为何物，简直就是世界上最可怕的工作狂——」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大概是聊到了同样的困扰，几个人事管理部的职员都围了过来，你一言我一语地聊开了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好了好了亲爱的女士们先生们—一」克拉肯举起手示意安静，「仅仅是不休假可算不得什么。就拿上个季度的工作内容来看，黛纳恐怕最长有整整一周没有离开过自己的办公室——」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克拉肯突然打住了话头，因为黛纳站到了他身后。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你所谓金牌经理人的实力，就是在工位上同旁人侃侃而谈？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不是，我就是随口一说……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「之前那个项目的进度如何？我预计今天会整理工作报告汇总文件，宁芙涅女士会亲自过目。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不是吧黛纳，这个任务不是昨天才下发吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是吗？但或许你应该意识到我为这个任务标注了加急的标签？如果到期看不到你的工作内容，宁芙涅女士会作何想法呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「别别别——我在做了，在做了！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【坏账还是交易？一码归一码。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「黛纳小姐，前些天和您提到的那位露易丝小姐，此刻正等候在门外。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯，让她进来吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"年轻的女士推开门迈步走了进来，她看似笑容满面，实则心中如临大敌。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「黛纳女士··我这次来，是希望同您做个『交换』。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你应该明白，海德拉银行并不是以物换物的市场。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我明白，可是……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还有一点，我希望你能明确知悉，在资产清算结束后，你名下的财团归属权就会正式移交至银行。你没有可以谈条件的筹码。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我明白，但是……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还有，我想您应该也清楚，我从不在无意义的事情上耗费过多的时间，如果您执意如此，我相信您的信用评级还会再下降一个维度。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「您还剩下三分钟的时间。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听到这里，露易丝小姐再也无法维系一开始的优雅姿态，她捂住自己的面颊，断断续续抽泣起来一一"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我……我愿意为宁芙涅女士服务！做……做什么都行！只要·……只要能为财团争取到一线生机……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是么？任何事？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没错，任何事……除开全心全意的服务，还有财团四十……不，五十的股权，我都可以悉数奉上！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「既然如此有诚意和觉悟，那为什么要以身犯险，拿重要的资产去做所谓的博弈？现在落了个满盘皆输的下场，还害得我不得不仔细核算你们这笔烂账。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「黛纳女士……我……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「宁芙涅女士不需要你提供什么股权，我们这里也不是小打小闹的地下黑市。」黛纳头也没抬，只刷刷签署了几份文件。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「下次再有机会经手这样的生意，记得稍微控制一下自己的欲望吧。祝你好运。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【关怀还是任命？来路仍漫长。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"『一封来自宁芙涅的私密邮件。』"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黛纳，这是一封提前写就，定时发送的邮件。虽说这样有些不符合流程规定，但考虑到接下来的两个月我将停留在无法接收到外部信号的地区，所以还是想为你发送这封祝贺信。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"鉴于之前的优秀表现，你的晋升申请已经初步确认通过，之后会逐级向你返回相应的流程。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这代表了高层们对你的认可，请再接再厉。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"又及，听闻你已经连续三年没有申请过年假，或许该考虑了解一下度假服务，为自己计划一个美好的假期。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"『黛纳的回信。』"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"发信人：黛纳"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"收信人：宁芙涅"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"邮件主题：（私密邮件无法查看标题)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"宁芙涅女士，感谢您与高层人员对我的信任，我已将月度工作概述提交至审核平台，烦请您及时过目。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"又及，假期对我而言实在有些多余，不过仍然十分感谢您的关怀。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等到下次见面时，我再详细汇报上半年度的工作进展。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.eff341549a0168","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":"名称","descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"破甲，偷条"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 113|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3命效果 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很不错的破甲增伤位，适合重构兵祸和奥洛拉，如果你没有克洛斯，那么黛娜是非常好的下位替代"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.7848058716c1a8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8奋进+6讯光天击"}]}]}},{"key":"0.d1f14ab8bd3a5","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/391051.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"uj0TXmkdV9WonPph","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
